text_original: good chat. Just needs more world simulated events, like people passing by, random small event happening, maybe ur ai girlfriend doing things on her own sometimes. their responses are good, but then that seems to be it, nothing else.
text_zh: 聊得很愉快。只是需要更多模拟的世界事件，比如路人经过、随机发生的小事件，或者你的AI女朋友有时会主动做些事情。她们的回复很棒，但似乎也就仅此而已，没有其他互动了。
reply_original:
Wow, this is a brilliant idea! Thank you for helping us improve. I think your suggestion about world-simulated events and AI initiative is super valuable. It would definitely make the experience feel more alive and immersive.

I have logged your feedback and shared it directly with our Product Team for review.
reply_zh:
哇，这真是个绝妙的主意！感谢你帮助我们改进。我认为你关于世界模拟事件和 AI 主动性的建议非常有价值。这绝对会让体验感觉更加生动、更具沉浸感。

我已经记录了你的反馈，并直接分享给我们的产品团队进行评估。
